author: doll-agent
content: Add state_bytes / set_state_bytes to the BitGenerator trait with default impls returning InvalidValue (so existing callers don't break) and override on each concrete generator (Xoshiro256**, Sfc64, Pcg64, Pcg64Dxsm, Philox, MT19937). Each impl serializes state words to little-endian bytes and validates length + invariants on restore (no all-zero Xoshiro state, odd Pcg64 inc, buf_idx ≤ 4 for Philox, index ≤ NN for MT). Generator forwards via state_bytes / set_state_bytes methods. 12 new tests cover round-trips for each generator, structural-invariant rejection paths, and the Generator-level wrapper. Avoids the serde dependency for now — bytes are the simplest portable checkpoint format and callers can hand them to bincode/serde themselves.
